title: Ann Ballard
compiled_truth: Ann Ballard is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-24), Ann Ballard sent 6 and received 91 emails, totalling 97 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (5), [Shonnie Daniel](people/shonnie-daniel) (4), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (1), [Carol Essig](people/carol-essig) (1).
